description: Read-only Airbyte administration tools for inspecting workspaces, connector definitions, sources, destinations, connections, sync jobs, users, organizations, permissions, and tags via the official Airbyte Public API.

tools.name: public_get-application
tools.description: Get an Application detail. Required: applicationId. Returns the ApplicationRead.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: applicationId

tools.name: public_get-connection
tools.description: Get Connection details. Required: connectionId. Returns the ConnectionResponse.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: connectionId

tools.name: public_get-destination
tools.description: Get Destination details. Required: destinationId. Optional: includeSecretCoordinates. Returns the DestinationResponse.

params.name: includeSecretCoordinates
params.description: Rather than return *** for secret properties include the secret coordinate information

params.name: destinationId
params.description: destinationId

tools.name: public_get-documentation
tools.description: Root path, currently returns a redirect to the documentation.

tools.name: public_get-job
tools.description: Get Job status and details. Required: jobId. Returns the JobResponse.

params.name: jobId
params.description: jobId

tools.name: public_get-source
tools.description: Get Source details. Required: sourceId. Optional: includeSecretCoordinates. Returns the SourceResponse.

params.name: includeSecretCoordinates
params.description: Rather than return *** for secret properties include the secret coordinate information

params.name: sourceId
params.description: sourceId

tools.name: public_get-stream-properties
tools.description: Get stream properties. Required: sourceId. Returns the StreamPropertiesResponse.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: ID of the source

tools.name: public_list-connector-definitions
tools.description: List connector definitions. Required: type. Optional: workspaceId. Returns the ConnectorDefinitionsResponse.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of connector definition to list

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The UUID of the workspace you wish to list connector definitions for. One of this or organizationId must be populated.

tools.name: public_list-destinations
tools.description: List destinations. Optional: workspaceIds. Returns the DestinationsResponse.

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: The UUIDs of the workspaces you wish to list destinations for. Empty list will retrieve all allowed workspaces.

tools.name: public_list-jobs
tools.description: List Jobs. Optional: connectionId, limit (default: 20), offset (default: 0). Returns the JobResponse.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Filter the Jobs by connectionId.

params.name: limit
params.description: Set the limit on the number of Jobs returned. The default is 20 Jobs.

params.name: offset
params.description: Set the offset to start at when returning Jobs. The default is 0.

tools.name: public_list-organizations-for-user
tools.description: List all organizations for a user. Returns the OrganizationsResponse.

tools.name: public_list-permissions
tools.description: List permissions. Optional: userId, organizationId. Returns the PermissionsResponse.

params.name: userId
params.description: User Id in permission.

params.name: organizationId
params.description: This is required if you want to read someone else's permissions, and you should have organization admin or a higher role.

tools.name: public_list-sources
tools.description: List sources. Optional: workspaceIds. Returns the SourcesResponse.

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: The UUIDs of the workspaces you wish to list sources for. Empty list will retrieve all allowed workspaces.

tools.name: public_list-tags
tools.description: Lists all tags. Optional: workspaceIds. Returns the TagsResponse.

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: Workspace ids

tools.name: public_list-users
tools.description: Organization Admin user can list all users within the same organization. Also provide filtering on a list of user IDs or/and a list of user emails. Required: organizationId. Optional: ids, emails. Returns the UsersResponse.

params.name: organizationId
params.description: Organization id

params.name: ids
params.description: List of user IDs to filter by

params.name: emails
params.description: List of user emails to filter by

tools.name: public_list-workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces. Optional: workspaceIds. Returns the WorkspacesResponse.

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: The UUIDs of the workspaces you wish to fetch. Empty list will retrieve all allowed workspaces.

tools.name: public_oauth-callback
tools.description: Redirected to by identity providers after authentication. Optional: queryParams.

params.name: queryParams
params.description: Query parameters. Should contain state and code.
